proposed_status_row.notes: First-pass extraction. Shadow-banking equations are paper-backed but OCR-sensitive; full CMR/SW base model and steady state require Appendix A or source-level review. No runtime validation.

validation.git_diff_check: passed; untracked files also checked with git diff --check --no-index

unresolved_formula_issues: Published paper defers full standard CMR/SW equations to Verona, Martins, and Drumond (2012), Appendix A, not present in this MinerU source.
MinerU OCR around equations (1)-(11) has visible superscript/bar artifacts and should be checked against PDF before review status is upgraded.
Implementation-derived household, investment, resource constraint, and timing formulas are marked needs_review.
